Name: Pict Section Tuigrid
Tagline: Toast UI Grid integration for spreadsheet-like tabular data display with sorting, filtering, and editing
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-pict-section-tuigrid-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#1bb9d3"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-pict-section-tuigrid-filled-light)"><circle cx="48" cy="48" r="36" fill="#e67d51" opacity="0.85"/>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="25" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="28" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PST</text>
	</svg>
